info.title: Billplz Payment API
info.description: Billplz is a payment platform for organizations to pay and get paid fastest, at the lowest cost possible. This spec covers V3, V4, and V5 endpoints for collections, bills, transactions, payment methods, tokenization, and payment orders.

mobile.description: Mobile number or email is required

delete.description: Only due (unpaid) bills can be deleted.

get.summary: List payment methods for a collection

put.summary: Update payment methods for a collection

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Auth using your API Secret Key as the username
